name: Primo Personal Loans
description_short: Primo Personal Loans Colorado Springs, Colorado — Primo Personal Loans offers short-term personal loans from $100 to $5,000 via an Express Loan product,...
description_long:
Primo Personal Loans is a short-term consumer lender headquartered at 1008 Gervais St STE 101, Columbia, SC 29201. The company operates primarily in South Carolina and appears to serve borrowers who need fast access to small-to-mid-range loan amounts. The referenced Memphis location URL returned a page-not-found error, suggesting the company may have limited or changing branch footprint outside its South Carolina base.

The company offers an Express Loan product with two borrowing tiers: $100 to $1,000 for smaller needs and $1,000 to $5,000 for larger short-term expenses. Applicants can request a free quote online. The website emphasizes that applying will not affect a borrower's FICO Score, though the lender may pull a report from a non-traditional consumer reporting agency, which could affect a borrower's profile with that agency. For online applications, funds may take up to two business days to be released pending verification.

Primo Personal Loans distinguishes itself with an accessible website featuring a built-in accessibility toolbar with options including keyboard navigation, contrast adjustment, text resizing, readable font mode, and highlighted links. The site uses SSL and TLS security protocols. The company also publishes a full USA PATRIOT Act disclosure explaining its identity verification requirements, reflecting at least a baseline of regulatory transparency.

Honestly, the profile available from the website is thin. The 'Page Not Found' error on the Memphis location URL raises questions about the company's multi-state reach. Loan terms, APR ranges, and fee structures are not disclosed on the site — borrowers are told that rates depend on state regulations and individual circumstances. The company's own disclaimer notes these products are not a substitute for long-term financial planning and recommends borrowers in hardship consult a licensed credit counselor first. Prospective borrowers should request full loan terms before committing.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
address: 7600 N Union Blvd #2, Colorado Springs, CO 80920

company_info.headquarters: 7600 N Union Blvd #2, Colorado Springs, CO 80920

pros: Applying does not affect your FICO Score
Free quote offered before committing to a loan
SSL and TLS security on the online application
Built-in website accessibility toolbar with multiple assist modes
Physical office location with listed phone number for direct contact
Transparent PATRIOT Act disclosure included on the site
cons: APR, fees, and repayment terms are not published on the website
Memphis location URL returns a 404 error — multi-state availability is unclear
May pull a non-traditional credit report, which could affect non-FICO profiles
Online applicants may wait up to two business days for funds after verification
Explicitly positioned as short-term only — not suitable for larger or ongoing financial needs
best_for: South Carolina residents needing a small short-term loan up to $5,000
Borrowers who want to protect their FICO Score during the application process
People who prefer having a local office and phone number for support
Consumers who need a free quote before deciding to borrow
diagnosis: Primo Personal Loans is best suited for South Carolina residents who need a small-to-mid-size short-term loan up to $5,000 and want to avoid a hard FICO inquiry. The main caveat is that interest rates and fees are not disclosed online, so borrowers must contact the lender directly to understand the true cost before accepting any offer.
services: In-person lending at Columbia, SC branch
Non-traditional credit check (alternative to FICO pull)
Identity verification per PATRIOT Act compliance
